NAVAREA XIX 113/20

1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 271830 UTC NOV 20 
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W. 

72-36.2N 021-17.7E WEST BOLLSTA
72-28.3N 020-12.7E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
71-18,3N 022 16,6E SCARABEO 8
70-40.2N 018-26.2E WEST HERCULES
65-31.3N 007-29.3E LEIV ERIKSSON 
65-10.3N 006-51.4E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE 

NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE. 
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW 

2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 110/20
